title: pact.files
description: Canonical wire schema for the pact.files Kafka topic, mirroring pact-files' internal/events/producer.go FileEvent. Field names and required/optional status are frozen - pact-audit pins this shape. additionalProperties is false at every level so an accidental field rename or addition fails validation instead of silently passing through as unrecognised JSONB. NOTE: on this topic event_id is the per-event dedup UUID and event_type carries the semantic event name - the opposite of the pact.auth/pact.account topic conventions.

event_id.description: Per-event dedup UUID, freshly minted for every published event (uuid.NewString()). Does NOT name the event kind - see event_type.

event_type.description: Semantic event name - closed set. Every buildOutboxPayload call site in pact-files uses one of these three; a terminal lifecycle transition emits exactly one such event.

purpose.description: Caller-declared upload purpose tag (e.g. "avatar"). Open set by design.

status.description: Closed set - the terminal file status this event announces, matching event_type. pact-files' file.Status type also has pending/processing values, but only a terminal transition ever publishes a pact.files event, so those two never appear on the wire.

extras.description: Event-specific metadata that does not warrant its own wire field. Open set by design - known keys today: "reason" (file_rejected, e.g. mime_mismatch/virus/size_exceeded), "actor" (file_deleted, "user" | "ttl"), "mime" (file_ready, detected MIME type).
